home.heroSubtitle: Or found something? Help items find their way home.

item.reportLostSub: Describe what you lost and where.
item.reportFoundSub: Help someone get their item back.
item.title: Title
item.emailPrivacy: Your email is never shown publicly. It's only used to forward messages about this item. No spam, no newsletters, no third parties. Ever.
item.tapMap: Tap the map to drop a pin
item.locationError: Could not get your location. Try searching for the address or dropping a pin on the map.

flyer.title: LOST
flyer.scanLost: Have you seen this? Scan to report a sighting
flyer.scanFound: Is this yours? Scan to claim it

contact.titleLost: Contact the person who lost this
contact.titleFound: Contact the person who found this
contact.description: Your message will be forwarded to the poster. They can choose to reply through Fundið.
contact.emailPrivacy: Only used so the poster can reply through Fundið. Never shown publicly.
contact.privacy: All communication goes through Fundið. No personal info is shared directly.
contact.sentDescription: Your message has been forwarded. The poster will reply to your email if they want to get in touch.
contact.rateLimited: Too many messages sent. Please try again later.
contact.failed: Failed to send message. Please try again.

claim.title: Your claim code
claim.description: Save this code. You'll need it to mark this item as resolved later. It won't be shown again.
claim.warning: This code will not be shown again. Save it now.
claim.resolveDescription: Enter the claim code you received when you posted this item.
claim.invalid: Invalid claim code. Please check and try again.

reply.title: Reply to message
reply.description: Your reply will be sent to the person who contacted you. Your email stays private.
reply.privacy: Your email is never shared. This reply is sent through Fundið.
reply.sentDescription: Your reply has been forwarded. If they respond again, you'll get another email.
reply.notFoundDescription: This reply link may have expired or is invalid.
reply.alreadyRepliedDescription: You've already replied to this message.

resolve.successDescription: Great news! This item has been marked as returned. Thanks for using Fundið.

about.title: About Fundið
about.description: Fundið is a community project to help people in Iceland find lost items.
about.step1: Report a lost or found item
about.step2: We notify you if something matches
about.step3: Get in touch and get your item back
